items.title: Novo Nordisk expands in China and Czech; Cellares boosts Series D by $50M
items.description:
Plus more from Eisai and Siegfried.

 🧱 Novo Nordisk's expansions: Novo Nordisk has invested around $380 million to expand its manufacturing facility in Bohumil, Central Bohemia, in the Czech Republic. Meanwhile ...
items.title_cn: Novo Nordisk expands in China and Czech; Cellares boosts Series D by $50M

items.title: Biogen makes up to $1B deal for secretive anti-inflammatory biotech
items.description:
Biogen will pay as much as $1 billion — “predominantly” in milestone payments — to acquire a San Diego biotech that has disclosed little about its pipeline.

 The startup, RayThera, debuted last year with a little more ...
items.title_cn: Biogen makes up to $1B deal for secretive anti-inflammatory biotech
items.description_cn: Biogen宣布以最高1.0亿美元收购RayThera，主要看中其抗炎药物研发管线。大部分款项将根据研发里程碑支付。

items.title: Jazz turns to AbCellera for T cell engagers in up to $4.1B partnership
items.description:
For much of its first decade, Canadian antibody developer AbCellera signed partnership after partnership, securing 40 biopharma alliances that led to more than a dozen clinical-stage drug candidates.

 Then, in 2023 ...
items.title_cn: Jazz turns to AbCellera for T cell engagers in up to $4.1B partnership
items.description_cn: Jazz制药达成战略合作。合作领域为T细胞衔接器。

items.title: B cell therapy maker Be Bio stops hemophilia trial
items.description: Be Biopharma disclosed in a federal clinical trials listing that it has terminated its study of a hemophilia B therapy made by editing a patient’s own cells. It was one of ...
items.title_cn: B cell therapy maker Be Bio stops hemophilia trial
items.description_cn: 某临床试验被终止。试验涉及血友病治疗。
